rule CDB_Security_advisory_FreeHSM_C_v110__v121__ {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for [Security advisory] FreeHSM C v1.1.0 - v1.2.1 : raw CKM_ECDSA signatures not ext"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-06-28"
    strings:
                $actor = "UNC-CDB-INGEST" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}
